description: - Grid arrangement: Arakawa-A - This regular longitude - latitude grid serves for delivering the data. The data is regridded from the IFS Cycle36r4 L91 model grid (which is a spectral representation with triangular truncation at wavenumber 255 with a linear N128 reduced Gaussian grid). - Horizontal gird for the the interpolated output for the IFS Atmosphere component in the EC-Earth3-ESM-1-1 configuration
